G

generateLayer(int, Layer) - Statische Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
Generates a new layer for the FFNetwork constructor
generateOutputFor(Sequence[]) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.MultiHeadAttention
Generates an output for a list of inputs(embedding lists).
generateQKVMatrices(Sequence[]) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.EDHead
Calculates the QKVMatrices based on the decoder and encoder input embeddings.
generateQKVMatrices(Sequence[]) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
Generates a list of query, key and value matrices based on the heads weights and biases.
getActivation() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Neuron
Getter for current Activation
getConnections() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Neuron
Getter for connections
getDelta() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Neuron
Getter for delta
getEmbeddingAmount() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.MultiHeadAttention
Getter for the used embedding amount of this MHA.
getEmbeddingSize() - Methode in Datensatzklasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.embedding.Embedding
Getter for the size of the data array.
getEmbeddingSize() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.MultiHeadAttention
Getter for the used embedding size of this MHA.
getHeads() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.MultiHeadAttention
Getter for the heads stored in the MultiHeadAttention
getHiddenLayerAmount() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
A Getter for the amount of hidden-layers in this network
getHiddenLayerSize() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
A Getter for the size of the middle layers size
getInputEmbeddingAmount() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
 
getInputEmbeddingSize() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
 
getInputs() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.datasets.Dataset
 
getInputSize() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
A Getter for the size of the first layer's size
getLayers() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
Getter for the layer-list of this network
getName() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.datasets.Dataset
 
getNetworkLoss() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.DeepNetwork
Gets the network loss
getNetworkLoss() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.EvolutionNetwork
 
getNetworkLoss() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
Gets the network loss
getOutput() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
Gets all output activations
getOutput() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.Network
 
getOutput() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.DecoderTransformer
 
getOutput() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
Generates an output of this head by using the current attention, which is multiplied with the current value-vectors
getOutput() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.S2STransformer
 
getOutputFor(Sequence...) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.Block
Gets the output for the inserted input(s) by passing them through the mha module and mlp.
getOutputSize() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
A Getter for the size of the last layer's size
getRandomBias() - Statische Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Connection
 
getRandomWeight() - Statische Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Connection
 
getRawList() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.embedding.Sequence
Generate a 'raw' Double list for this sequence containing all embedding values
getSourceNeuron() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Connection
Getter for the source neuron
getTargets() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.datasets.Dataset
 
getWeight() - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.structure.Connection
Getter for the weight
